title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapped growth playbook from zero to $10M ARR, covering strategies like product-led growth, SEO optimization, churn reduction, and pricing experimentation. The episode includes his decision-making framework and reflections on when to raise capital versus remain independent.
